Ad Text:
About us 
At CareSuper, we believe we’re Super Together. As a profit-to-member super fund with over 550,000 members and $63 billion in assets, we’re passionate about helping our members retire with confidence. We’re growing fast and looking for our next superhero to join us on this exciting journey. 

About the role 
We’re looking for a curious, tech-savvy and analytically minded Investment Operations Analyst to join our Finance team, reporting to the Unit Pricing & Reporting Manager. 
This role is ideal for someone who thrives on solving complex problems, improving processes, and using data and technology to drive smarter outcomes. You might come from a data, analytics, consulting, or accounting background (including experience comparable to Big 4 advisory environments), and be excited to apply those skills in an investment operations setting. 
Your mission will be to help modernise and strengthen our investment reporting, unit pricing, and operational processes — leveraging data, automation and AI wherever possible. 
In this role you will:    

Support the daily oversight and validation of unit pricing calculations, with a focus on control, accuracy and automation 
Assist in preparing regulatory and statutory reporting  
Accurately capture and maintain investments related data (valuations, security data) across all portfolios  
Identify and implement opportunities to automate manual processes using Excel, VBA, SQL, Power BI or similar tools 
Use data analytics techniques to improve accuracy, efficiency and insight generation. 
Support strategic and operational projects, including process redesign, system enhancements, and reporting uplift initiatives 
Assist in building, documenting and maintaining scalable, well-documented reporting and control frameworks 
Explore responsible use of AI tools to enhance reporting workflows and data validation and reconciliations 
Contribute to management and board-level reporting packs through clear data analysis and visualisation 
Support audits and compliance processes through structured documentation and reconciliations. 
  
What we’re looking for  
We’re on the lookout for passionate individuals who embody our values. You’ll thrive in this role if you: 

Have entry level experience in consulting, audit, fund accounting, analytics, financial services, or a similar analytical environment (experience comparable to Big 4 advisory, audit or consulting teams is highly regarded) 
Have strong technical capability in Excel and are comfortable working with large datasets 
Have experience with data tools such as SQL, Power BI, Python or similar, knowledge of investment data systems, including unit pricing or valuation systems would be highly regarded. 
Are confident learning new systems and leveraging AI tools to improve efficiency 
Enjoy problem-solving and improving processes — not just maintaining them 
Have strong attention to detail and a structured approach to reviewing complex models 
Can translate technical outputs into clear insights for non-technical stakeholders 
Work well in small, collaborative teams 
Why CareSuper?  
We’re not just another super fund. We’re a values-driven organisation that puts people first—our members and our team. Here’s what you can look forward to:   

Hybrid and flexible work environment 
3% Superannuation Guarantee (SG) above industry minimum 
Matching an additional superannuation salary sacrifice of up to 2% 
5 weeks of annual leave 
16 weeks of parental leave for all eligible employees  
Holistic health and wellbeing support - free annual flu shots, skin checks, Employee Assistance Program 
External Employee Coaching Program and Professional Development 
Rewards and Recognition Program, as well as employee discounts and cashback offers on a broad range of products and services 
  
Ready to apply? 
We’d love to hear from you! Just send through your resume and a cover letter. Be quick—we may close applications early if we find the right person.  
  
What happens next? 
Need support during the application or interview process? We’re here to help. Just reach out to your talent partner and let us know how we can make the process work for you. 

We’re committed to protecting your privacy—your personal information will be handled with care and in line with our Privacy Policy. 

At CareSuper, we know that diverse perspectives make us stronger. We’re proud to foster an inclusive environment where everyone feels welcome, respected, and valued—no matter your background or identity.
